mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER(MEMBER_LOGINID, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PWD, MEMBER_PHONE) VALUES(#{memberLoginId}, #{memberName}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPwd}, #{memberPhone})
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_LOGINID, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_RATING FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_LOGINID = #{loginId} AND MEMBER_PWD = #{pwd}

SELECT b.BOARD_ID, b.BOARD_CATEGORY, b.BOARD_TITLE, b.BOARD_HIT, b.BOARD_DATE, b.MEMBER_ID, m.MEMBER_LOGINID FROM MEMBER m JOIN BOARD b ON m.MEMBER_ID = b.MEMBER_ID WHERE b.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.BOARD_ID DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
